pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly defines TARGET_PROJECT as this path and ensures it is removed prior to task start.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh and install_gvsig.sh which create this directory to store gvSIG projects.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real GIS data from Natural Earth (ne_110m_admin_0_countries). The expected output is a newly saved gvSIG project file located exactly at '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/world_countries.gvsproj'.
